reviews.review_title: Message: Please Wait and Login Screen
reviews.review_description: The login screen is unresponsive. You app seems really interesting. Can you please provide us with assistance to run you app beyond the login screen?

Thought this looked cool, so I downloaded it. After the title screen loaded, I was asked to sign in with my username and password. No option to sign up, only to sign in with a membership that I'm sure was generated elsewhere for a cost.

Uninstall, remove.
